title: How to Leverage Predictive Uncertainty Estimates for Reducing Catastrophic Forgetting in Online Continual Learning

conference.name: 3rd Workshop on Uncertainty Reasoning and Quantification in Decision Making

methodology.approach: Investigating predictive uncertainty estimates for memory management
methodology.comparison: Uncertainty-based approaches vs. other memory management strategies
methodology.focus: Different types of samples (uncertain vs. representative) for memory management

key_findings: Predictive uncertainty measures help reduce catastrophic forgetting in different settings
Investigation into which type of data points (easiest-to-forget or easiest-to-remember) are more effective in combating CF
related_work: Memory-based strategies for preventing catastrophic forgetting
Random, gradient-based, and loss-based memory management approaches
Bang et al. (2021) method combining predictive uncertainty and data augmentation
research_questions: How to effectively use predictive uncertainty scores for memory management
Which type of data points (uncertain vs. representative) are more effective in reducing CF
